bento.collaborationText: Open communication, async updates, zero surprises

aboutSection.label: Know About Me
aboutSection.bio1: I'm Aayush Bharti, a proactive full-stack developer passionate about creating dynamic web experiences. From frontend to backend, I thrive on solving complex problems with clean, efficient code. My expertise spans React, Next.js, and Node.js, and I'm always eager to learn more.
aboutSection.bio2: When I'm not immersed in work, I'm exploring new ideas and staying curious. Life's about balance, and I love embracing every part of it.
aboutSection.bio3: I believe in waking up each day eager to make a difference!

explore.label: My Site
explore.guestbookText: Let me know you were here

cta.availability: I'm available for full-time roles & freelance projects.
cta.description: I thrive on crafting dynamic web applications, and delivering seamless user experiences.

aboutPage.label: About Me
aboutPage.story1: I started my journey in web development back in 2020, fascinated by the power of creating things that millions of people can use. What began as curiosity quickly turned into a passion.
aboutPage.story2: Today, I specialize in building modern web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I love working with startups and founders who have bold ideas and need someone to bring them to life.
aboutPage.story3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or sharing my knowledge through blog posts and mentoring.
aboutPage.cleanCodeDesc: Writing maintainable, well-documented code that stands the test of time.
aboutPage.userExperienceDesc: Creating intuitive interfaces that users love to interact with.
aboutPage.continuousLearningDesc: Staying updated with the latest technologies and best practices.
aboutPage.ctaText: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.

projectPage.letsDiscuss: Let's discuss how I can help with your project.

blogPage.label: Blog
blogPage.subtitle: I write about web development, design patterns, and lessons learned from building products.
blogPage.newsletterText: Get notified when I publish new articles. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.

footer.brand: I'm Aayush - a full-stack developer, freelancer & problem solver. Thanks for checking out my site!
